meta.title: Fees & How We're Paid | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Transparent fee structure from a fee-based fiduciary financial adviser in Woodland Hills, CA. Learn how we're compensated, what's included, and what other costs may apply.
meta.ogTitle: Fees & How We're Paid | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.ogDescription: Transparent, fee-based fiduciary financial planning. Understand how we're compensated, what services are included, and what costs may apply.

hero.headline: We believe fee transparency matters.
hero.subheadline: Before you decide to work with us, we want you to understand how we are compensated, what services those fees cover, and what other costs may apply through third parties. Our goal is to provide clear, upfront information so you can make an informed decision.

sections.heading: Advisory Fees
paragraphs: For ongoing investment management, Prosperity Planning & Advisory charges an annual advisory fee based on a percentage of the assets we manage for you.
Our standard advisory fee is 1.00% per year of assets under management (AUM).
items: Calculated based on the value of your managed account
Charged quarterly in arrears
Typically deducted directly from your account with your authorization
footnotes: For example, if we manage a $100,000 account for a full year, the annual advisory fee would generally be $1,000.
Specific billing details, timing, and any prorated charges are described in your advisory agreement and Form ADV brochure.

sections.heading: Financial Planning and Consulting Fees
paragraphs: In addition to ongoing portfolio management, we may offer stand-alone financial planning or consulting services.
sections.listHeading: Depending on the engagement, these services may be billed as:
items: A fixed fee
An hourly fee
Another clearly disclosed planning fee arrangement agreed to in advance
footnotes: Any planning or consulting fee will be discussed with you before work begins, and the scope of services will be outlined in your agreement.

sections.heading: What Our Advisory Fees Cover
paragraphs: Our advisory fees are for the investment advisory and financial planning services we provide. Depending on your engagement, that may include:
items: Investment strategy and portfolio guidance
Ongoing monitoring and reviews
Financial planning recommendations
Retirement planning
Cash flow and budgeting guidance
Coordination with your tax and legal professionals when appropriate

sections.heading: Other Costs You May Pay
paragraphs: Our advisory fee does not include all costs associated with your accounts or investments.
sections.listHeading: Depending on the investments and custodian you use, you may also incur:
items: Custodian or platform fees
Mutual fund or ETF expense ratios
Transaction charges, spreads, or other trading-related costs through your custodian or investment provider
Other account-related fees charged by third parties
footnotes: We do not control third-party fees, and they are separate from the fees charged by our firm. You should review all applicable fees and expenses associated with your accounts and investments.

sections.heading: Fee Deduction and Custody
paragraphs: If you authorize us to deduct advisory fees directly from your managed account, that deduction will be handled through your account custodian. Your custodian will continue to maintain your assets, and you will receive account statements directly from the custodian.

sections.heading: We Are Fee-Based, Not Commission-Based for Advisory Services
paragraphs: Prosperity Planning & Advisory is compensated by advisory fees for advisory services provided through the firm. We do not receive commissions for advisory services provided through Prosperity Planning & Advisory.
That means when we provide investment advisory services, our compensation is generally based on the advisory fee arrangement disclosed to you in advance.

sections.heading: Insurance and Separate Compensation Disclosure
paragraphs: As part of our planning process, we may discuss insurance needs such as life insurance, disability insurance, or other protection strategies.
Prosperity Planning & Advisory, LLC does not sell insurance products and does not receive insurance commissions.

Separately from the advisory firm, Marcus Mann is licensed as a California insurance producer and, through a separate non-advisory business, may offer certain insurance products, including life insurance and fixed annuity products. If a client chooses to purchase an insurance product through that separate business, compensation may be paid by the insurance company in the form of commissions.
This creates a potential conflict of interest because compensation may be received in connection with the sale of insurance products.
items: Insurance activity is separate from the advisory firm
Clients are under no obligation to purchase any insurance product through Marcus Mann
Advisory recommendations are made independently of whether a client purchases any insurance product
Clients are free to use any insurance professional or provider they choose

sections.heading: Our Commitment to Transparency
paragraphs: We believe clients deserve to understand how their adviser is paid.
Our fee structure is designed to support an ongoing advisory relationship focused on your long-term financial goals, while clearly disclosing material conflicts and compensation arrangements.
If you become a client, you will receive additional details in your advisory agreement and Form ADV brochure, including information about fees, billing, services, and important disclosures.

disclosure: All investments and financial strategies involve risk, and no specific results are guaranteed. Registration as an investment adviser does not imply a certain level of skill or training.

ctaBand.heading: Questions About Fees?
ctaBand.body: We welcome questions about how we are compensated, what services are included, and what costs may apply to your situation. We believe those conversations should be clear, direct, and easy to understand.
